statement: AMD reports strengthening customer engagement around the MI450 Series and Helios, with leading-customer forecasts exceeding its initial expectations.
why: Design-win momentum and above-plan customer forecasts for next-gen Instinct precede future revenue.

impact.mechanism: Strengthening engagement and rising forecasts for MI450 and Helios indicate growing forward GPU demand.

evidence.excerpt: Customer engagement around MI450 Series and Helios is strengthening, with leading customer forecasts exceeding our initial expectations.

confidence.basis: Primary AMD investor-relations earnings release (CEO commentary).
